_comment: Balance sweep on the game's DEFAULT MAP (the planet). 'planet' is adapted from ../../maps/sample-map.json via game_map_adapter.js and uses the map's baked bi-directional travel costs + calorie food capacity. urbanize:false = fixed strategy-seeded cities (the clean, convergent balance mode; the interactive sandbox uses urbanize:true to watch emergence). Run: node harness.js sweep_planet.json
